PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-05-2020 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-08-2020 Continued To Aug-05-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gener Benitez appeared by telephone for Ana Andrade and Lillian Vasquez (Petitioners).

The Court noted that it appears that the assets in the estate are $5,000.00 and that the questions raised by the Probate Examiner have not been answered. Mr. Benitez stated that he can check again with Mr. Ibarra. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to August 5, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not Reported.
